nodes.summary: Add descriptor-kustomization cross-check assertion in template_smoke_assertions.py
Guarantee template file content consistency between descriptor.yaml.tmpl and kustomization.yaml infra bootstrap template
All file reads constrained to repo_root argument; no new I/O paths outside generated temp repo
Per-filename AssertionError messages identifying missing filename, descriptor path, and kustomization path
AssertionError causes non-zero exit so blueprint-template-smoke reliably fails on drift
No operator action required; fix fully contained in blueprint tooling
Smoke exits non-zero with named AssertionError when descriptor references a filename absent from kustomization
Smoke exits 0 with no assertion errors when descriptor and kustomization reference the same filenames
descriptor.yaml.tmpl and infra bootstrap kustomization.yaml reference the same set of manifest filenames
